organizations.role: Major individual donor — $25,000 on 2023-10-17 and $25,000 on 2026-01-20, both reported with employer TaskUs. UDP is the federal super PAC created by AIPAC in late 2021 to run independent expenditures in Democratic primaries on behalf of candidates supportive of the U.S.-Israel relationship; it spent $14.5M to defeat Rep. Jamaal Bowman and $8.6M to defeat Rep. Cori Bush in 2024.
organizations.notes: Jaspar Weir co-founded TaskUs in 2008 with CEO Bryce Maddock and has served as its President since founding and as a director since October 2018; TaskUs is a publicly traded provider of outsourced digital customer experience, content moderation and back-office services. He was on Inc.'s 2016 30 Under 30 list and won the 2017 EY Entrepreneur of the Year award. The self-reported 'President / TaskUs' matches exactly and is unique. Note on address: the Austin filing carries a Los Angeles 90067 (Century City) address, but his FEC filings show him at Austin 78731/78703 continuously since 2017 and his LinkedIn lists Austin, Texas — the 90067 entry appears to be a corporate/LA address rather than his residence.
